description_long: This object is a futuristic, gray aircraft with a streamlined, elongated fuselage and a robust, armored appearance. The nose section features a multi-paneled cockpit with dark, angular windows, suggesting a multi-seat, enclosed cockpit. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with additional stabilizing fins and a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer tail configuration. The rear of the aircraft houses two large, cylindrical jet engines, and the undercarriage appears to be integrated into the body, with no visible landing gear. The surface is matte and slightly textured, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look suitable for urban or military environments.
description: A gray, futuristic airplane with a multi-paneled cockpit, swept mid-mounted wings, and twin rear jet engines. Its armored, matte surface and angular design give it a robust, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, cockpit windows, and the twin rear jet engines with the distinctive tail fins.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the swept mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and the overall planform of the aircraft.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the cockpit, fuselage details, and engine placement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the two large jet engines, twin vertical stabilizers, and the compact tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are integrated into the fuselage with a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail with a horizontal stabilizer connecting both fins, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable or internal bays.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with angular, multi-pane windows.
